title: Confluence connector (Beta)
body: The fully-managed Confluence connector in Lakeflow Connect enables you to ingest Confluence spaces, pages, attachments, blogposts, labels, and classification levels into Databricks. See [Configure OAuth U2M for Confluence ingestion](/aws/en/ingestion/lakeflow-connect/confluence-source-setup).

ref_links.text: Configure OAuth U2M for Confluence ingestion
